excited to introduce the TourRadar AI Assistant, a new way to search, explore, and book multi-day tours, river cruises, safaris and adventures through a conversational AI experience. Simply describe what kind of trip you're looking for, and let the assistant do the rest.\n\n\nWHAT YOU CAN DO\n---------------\n\nSearch for Tours\n\n  - Describe your dream trip in your own words, for example  \"a 10-day hiking adventure in nepal\" or \"a europe tour through paris, rome and munich\" and get relevant tour suggestions instantly.\n  - Filter results by destination, travel dates, trip duration, group size, price range, and more.\n  - Browse results visually with tour cards showing images, prices, ratings, and key details at a glance.\n\nExplore Tour Details\n\n  - View full itineraries: see what happens each day of the tour, complete with descriptions and photos.\n  - Check ratings and reviews: see overall scores and breakdowns for accommodation, transport, food, guides, and itinerary.\n  - See the route on a map: an interactive map shows you exactly where the tour goes, day by day.\n  - Compare multiple tours side by side on the map to help you decide which route is best for you.\n\nCheck Availability and Prices\n\n  - Browse departure dates by selecting a month to see what's available.\n  - See departure status: know whether a departure is guaranteed, on request, or already sold out.\n  - View pricing for each departure including any promotions or discounts.\n\nBook and Get More Information\n\n  - Request a booking directly through the assistant. Provide your details and receive a confirmation link to complete your reservation.\n  - Send a brochure to your email. Get a PDF with all the tour details for offline reading or sharing with travel companions.\n  - Read FAQs. get answers to common questions about inclusions, requirements, and policies for any tour.\n\nLook Up Reference Information\n\n  - Ask about available countries, cities, continents, currencies, languages, and tour types to help narrow down your search.\n  - Search for a specific tour operator by name to find tours run by your favourite company.\n\n\nHOW IT WORKS\n------------\n\nThe TourRadar AI Assistant works inside ChatGPT. Just start a conversation, describe what you're looking for, and the assistant will search TourRadar's catalogue of thousands of tours from thousands of operators worldwide.\n\nYou'll see interactive cards, maps, and tables; all designed to help you find and book the perfect trip without leaving the chat.\n\n\nTIPS FOR GETTING THE BEST RESULTS\n----------------------------------\n\n  - Be specific, for example,  \"7-day cultural tour in Japan in October for 2 people under $3000\" will give better results than just \"Japan tours.\"\n  - Use follow-up questions, after seeing results, ask things like \"show me the itinerary\" or \"what departures are available in June?\"\n  - Try the map view,  it's a great way to understand the route before you commit.\n  - Send yourself a brochure, handy for sharing with friends or reviewing later.\n\n\nWe hope you enjoy exploring the world with the TourRadar AI Assistant.
